Notice Of Motion And Motiuon To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Douglas Akay's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. The Request For Admissions served upon Plaintiff are deemed admitted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the form interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $440, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
